title.en: China-to-Netherlands Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入荷兰：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入荷蘭：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Netherlands (NEN/ACM/TenneT) expectations: NEN-EN-adopted standards routes, TenneT and DSO (Liander, Stedin, Enexis) grid-connection processes, CE-marking-aligned requirements, NEN-EN-IEC 62109, IEC 62116, IEC 61727, NEN-EN 50530, IEC 62920 and NEN-EN-IEC 61000 evidence, with 230/400 V 50 Hz grid settings and Rotterdam as the main port — versus China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与荷兰（NEN/ACM/TenneT）要求的对照，包括NEN-EN采用路径、TenneT/配电运营商（Liander、Stedin、Enexis）并网审查、EU CE一致性证据、NEN-EN-IEC 62109、IEC 62116、IEC 61727、NEN-EN 50530、IEC 62920 / NEN-EN-IEC 61000 证据；并考虑230/400 V、50 Hz电网与鹿特丹主要港口，与中国 GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004 和 GB/T 19964 基准比较。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與荷蘭（NEN/ACM/TenneT）要求的對照，包括NEN-EN採用路徑、TenneT/配電運營商（Liander、Stedin、Enexis）併網審查、EU CE一致性證據、NEN-EN-IEC 62109、IEC 62116、IEC 61727、NEN-EN 50530、IEC 62920 / NEN-EN-IEC 61000 證據；並考慮230/400 V、50 Hz 電網與鹿特丹主要港口，與中國 GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004 和 GB/T 19964 基準比較。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, standards determination, grid-operator approval, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters and importers should verify current Netherlands (NEN/ACM/TenneT) requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、标准裁定、并网审批、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行荷兰（NEN/ACM/TenneT）要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、標準裁定、併網核准、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行荷蘭（NEN/ACM/TenneT）要求。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to the Netherlands, practical gaps are: confirm the applicable NEN-EN route and DSO project-level approval path with Liander, Stedin or Enexis; validate that NEN-EN-IEC 62109-1/-2 safety testing, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence, NEN-EN 50530 efficiency, and IEC 62920 / NEN-EN-IEC 61000 EMC documentation are accepted for Dutch installations; and prove 230/400 V 50 Hz performance, protection thresholds, and reconnection timing consistent with TenneT and DSO grid codes. China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964 documents are useful but not automatically interchangeable with Dutch evidence, and Dutch-language documentation is often expected.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口荷兰时，主要差距包括：与Liander、Stedin或Enexis确认NEN-EN适用路径与配电运营商项目级审批，核实NEN-EN-IEC 62109-1/-2 安全型式试验、IEC 62116 防孤岛、IEC 61727 并网接口、NEN-EN 50530 效率和IEC 62920/NEN-EN-IEC 61000 EMC证据是否被荷兰项目接受，并验证230/400 V 50 Hz下符合TenneT及配电运营商电网规程的保护阈值和重连延迟；中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004 与 GB/T 19964证据不能自动替代荷兰证据，且通常要求荷兰语文件。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口荷蘭時，主要差距包括：與Liander、Stedin或Enexis確認NEN-EN適用路徑與配電運營商專案級審核，核實NEN-EN-IEC 62109-1/-2 安全型式試驗、IEC 62116 防孤島、IEC 61727 並網介面、NEN-EN 50530 效率和IEC 62920/NEN-EN-IEC 61000 EMC證據是否被荷蘭專案接受，並驗證230/400 V 50 Hz下符合TenneT及配電運營商電網規程的保護閾值和重連延遲；中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004 與 GB/T 19964證據不能自動替代荷蘭證據，且通常要求荷蘭語文件。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
